name: Osaka Soda Co., Ltd.
summary: Osaka Soda Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells specialty chemical products. Its products include caustic soda, chlorine gas, liquid chlorine, hydrogen gas, caustic potash, hydrochloric acid, sodium hypochlorite, low salt sodium hypochlorite, ferric chloride, sodium chlorate, sodium chlorite, stabilized chlorine dioxide, allyl chloride, epichlorohydrin, trichloropropane, 1,3-dichloropropene, paint materials, adhesive materials, etc. The company also provides epichlorohydrin and acrylic rubber products, as well as diallyl phthalate resins non-phthalate allyl, and epoxy resins. In addition, it offers silica gel used for liquid chromatography; active pharmaceutical ingredients and their intermediates; polysulfide silane coupling agents; electrodes; and lens materials. Further, the company offers DAP decorative boards, products for housing facilities, and health foods; and mercury reclamation services, as well as recycles fluorescent lights, mercury lamps, electrical discharge tubes, LCD backlights, glass and metal products, and plastic products. Additionally, it is involved in the transportation and storage of chemical products; and provision of environmental preservation facilities, etc., as well as operates chemical plants. The company was formerly known as DAISO Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Osaka Soda Co., Ltd. in October 2015. Osaka Soda Co., Ltd. was founded in 1915 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
